ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the menu item belongs to */,
  "nutrition_info" TEXT /* Nutritional information in a structured format */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is vegetarian */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is gluten-free */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently available on the menu */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES menu_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_categories" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the menu item belongs to */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is the primary category for the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the ingredient per unit */,
  "is_allergen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is an allergen */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is vegetarian */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is gluten-free */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_ingredients" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient used in the menu item */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the menu item */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is optional for the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, restaurant manager, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
